creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Part of the build log:

===>  Installing for samba410-4.10.5_1
===>  Checking if samba410 is already installed
===>   Registering installation for samba410-4.10.5_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/etc/ctdb/events/legacy/00.ctdb.script:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/etc/ctdb/events/legacy/01.reclock.script:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/etc/ctdb/events/legacy/05.system.script:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/etc/ctdb/events/legacy/10.interface.script:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba410
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba410


# find /usr/obj/usr/ports/ -name 00.ctdb.script
/usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/samba-4.10.5/ctdb/config/events/legacy/00.ctdb.script
/usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/share/ctdb/events/legacy/00.ctdb.script

All required files are in
/usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/share/ctdb/events/legacy/
but install process search in
/usr/obj/usr/ports/net/samba410/work/stage/usr/local/etc/ctdb/events/legacy/
share vs etc

I can't fix it correct way - don't know what behavior (path) is correct.
